items.title: ChatGPT Is Smarter, More Accurate, and Less Obsessed With Emojis After Upgrade
items.summary: ChatGPT's default model has been updated to GPT-5.5 Instant , a model that brings accuracy improvements with fewer hallucinations, especially in areas like medicine, law, and finance, according to OpenAI. GPT-5.5 Instant is more capable at...

items.title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
items.summary: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.

items.title: High-power EV charging hits one of the US's busiest freight routes
items.summary: Greenlane is taking its heavy-duty EV truck charging network beyond California, and it's heading straight into one of the busiest freight corridors in the US.

items.title: Delayed Siri features class action suit ends with massive $250M settlement
items.summary: While Apple's promised Siri overhaul is still nowhere to be found, shareholders who sued over the delay can now rest easy, thanks to a huge settlement. Apple has settled a class-action lawsuit over its delayed Siri features. At WWDC 2024,...

items.title: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that's slowing down physical sciences
items.summary: Altara's AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.

items.title: Apple pressed by Maryland lawmakers over closure of first unionized U.S. store
items.summary: A group of two U.S. Senators and seven Members of Congress sent a letter to Tim Cook and John Ternus pressing Apple for answers over the planned closure of its Towson retail store. Here are the details.

items.title: A Detailed Evaluation of A Production Server With High-End MRDIMM Main Memory (BSC, Micron, Intel, UPC)
items.summary: A new technical paper, "Performance and Energy Benefits of MRDIMMs," was published by researchers at Barcelona Supercomputing Center, Universitat Politecnica de Catalunya, Micron and Intel Corporation. Abstract "Multiplexed Rank DIMMs...

items.title: Apple to Pay $250 Million to Settle Class Action Over Delayed Siri Features
items.summary: Apple will pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit accusing it of false advertising and unfair competition after the personalized Siri features it promoted when launching the iPhone 16 were delayed. A smarter, Apple Intelligence...

items.title: Palantir co-founder Peter Thiel backs $140M wave-powered AI data center startup - Panthalassa aims to run offshore compute nodes using ocean energy
items.summary: Panthalassa raises $140M to build wave-powered offshore nodes that generate electricity and run AI workloads at sea, tackling data center energy and cooling challenges.

items.title: How Bluetooth(R) Shorter Connection Intervals will impact the next generation of wireless innovations
